pages.image_tooltip: A sea scorpion from the Devonian and Carboniferous periods, these gentle giants liked to spend their time sifting through sediment, often making it more fertile in the process - Unbothered, Moisturized, Happy, In their lane and Plowing

pages.era_tooltip_period: Mid Devonian into the Late Carboniferous Period
pages.clone.clone_tooltip: Egg must be placed underwater to hatch
pages.feature_1.tooltip: Hibbertopterus’ home is the water, but it can survive indefinitely on land - The only thing it cannot do yet is fly
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Not at all concerned with players climbing on its back, one can even command Hibbertopterus to till vast areas of farmland with §aDirt on a Stick§7
